message: ci: fix pkg coverage parsing regex

files.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ jobs:
     - name: Enforce Coverage Thresholds (per-package, coarse)
       run: |
         set -e
-        go tool cover -func=coverage.out | awk '/^github.com\\/Dicklesworthstone\\/beads_viewer\\/pkg\\// {print $1, $3}' > pkgcov.txt
+        go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep '^github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/' | awk '{print $1, $3}' > pkgcov.txt
         while read -r path pct; do
           pct=${pct%\%}
           req=
